items.title: neuralmind 1.7.0
items.summary: Persistent memory for AI coding agents. Your agent learns your codebase the way a senior engineer would — what files go together, what you usually edit next, what patterns matter. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Continue, and any MCP-compatible agent. …
